caption: Changi Airport cargo area viewed from above. Buildings of varying sizes fill most of the frame, many with rooftop solar panels. Approximately 20 aircraft are parked at aprons and around the buildings. Taxiways connect the apron areas to the runway along one edge, and cylindrical storage tanks are visible in one corner.

Changi Airport terminal complex viewed from above. Three terminal buildings with finger piers extend outward, with approximately 30 aircraft docked along them. Jewel Changi Airport's distinctive toroidal glass-dome structure is visible at the junction between the terminals.

Changi Airport terminal and apron area viewed from above. Approximately 25 aircraft are visible across the compound, docked at terminal piers, on open aprons, and along a taxiway. An expressway interchange with looping flyovers sits nearby, and a golf course with green fairways borders one edge.

Airport viewed from above. A long runway with parallel taxiway runs diagonally across the frame with open grass fields alongside. Dense forest covers most of the surrounding area. Industrial buildings are visible along the periphery.

Airport viewed from above. A single runway runs diagonally across the frame, with a grid of taxiways and rectangular grass sections between them. Approximately 10 small aircraft are parked at aprons and on open areas near buildings along the perimeter.

Commercial district viewed from above. Tall office towers cast long shadows over a network of streets and low-rise shophouse blocks with orange-red clay-tile roofs. A construction site with exposed earth and cranes occupies one section, with an expressway flyover curving through.

Commercial district viewed from above. Large commercial buildings are clustered around road intersections, alongside rows of shophouses with orange clay-tile roofs. A shopping mall with a flat grey roof and an adjacent rooftop garden with winding pathways is visible at one edge. Residential blocks are interspersed among the commercial buildings.

Business park viewed from above. Commercial and office buildings are arranged in clusters around curving landscaped roads, with dense tropical trees throughout. A curved building forming a near-complete ring sits at the centre. Several buildings have rooftop solar panel arrays, and elevated MRT tracks run along one edge.

Shophouse district viewed from above. Dense rows of shophouses with orange terracotta tile rooftops fill most of the frame, arranged in a tight grid of narrow streets. A large shopping mall with a flat roof and other commercial buildings lie opposite the shophouses.

Commercial district viewed from above. A shopping mall with rooftop solar panels and a curved roofline occupies the centre of the frame. A landscaped rooftop with winding paths, circular features, and green spaces extends over one section of the mall. An expressway runs along one edge separating the mall from a forested hillside and residential buildings.

Commercial district viewed from above. Dense rows of shophouses with orange-red terracotta rooftops fill much of the frame, arranged in a tight grid of narrow streets. A large shopping mall occupies an edge, with commercial buildings and a cluster of condominium towers nearby. A building with a distinctive glass dome is visible among the shophouses.

Shophouse district viewed from above. Dense rows of shophouses with orange terracotta rooftops fill most of the frame in a tight grid of narrow streets. A mosque with a distinctive golden dome is visible among the shophouses. Commercial buildings border the shophouses along the edges, and a stretch of construction activity runs alongside one of the roads.

Business park viewed from above. Several large rectangular buildings with rooftop solar panels are arranged around a landscaped open space. Mature trees fill the spaces between the buildings, and an expressway runs diagonally along one edge.

Marina Bay waterfront viewed from above. Three large buildings with zigzag rooflines sit alongside the Marina Bay Sands cantilever structure along the edge of the bay. A construction site with exposed earth occupies an adjacent area. The dark waters of Marina Bay fill a large portion of the frame, with parkland and buildings visible at the periphery.

Business park viewed from above. A distinctive arc-shaped building with rooftop greenery sits at the centre, surrounded by several office buildings with rooftop solar panels. Mature tropical trees fill the spaces between the buildings.

Commercial district viewed from above. Large commercial buildings surround a major road junction, with tall towers casting deep shadows across the scene. A turquoise rooftop pool and landscaped deck sit atop one of the buildings, and a fan-shaped roof is visible along one edge.

Commercial district viewed from above. Tall skyscrapers with varied rooftop profiles fill the frame, casting deep shadows between them. Some buildings feature rooftop greenery. Trees line the roads at the edges of the frame.

Commercial district viewed from above. Commercial buildings and office towers line a road running diagonally through the frame, casting deep shadows across narrow streets. Shophouse rows with orange clay-tile roofs cluster at one corner. A circular building with an orange roof and a building with distinctive orange sail-like rooftop structures are visible at the periphery.

Commercial district viewed from above. A large building with a triangulated roof pattern occupies one section of the frame. Tall office towers are arranged in an arc around a circular feature. A swimming pool and adjacent courts sit at the periphery, and a wide multi-lane road runs along one edge.

Business park viewed from above. A mix of industrial and commercial buildings fill the frame, with several featuring curved and circular forms. Long grey-roofed buildings run through the centre of the estate, and some buildings have rooftop solar panels. Tropical trees line the streets between buildings, and patches of cleared land and green fields are scattered across the area.

Commercial district viewed from above. Tall office towers cast long shadows over the surrounding area. Shophouse rows with orange-red clay-tile roofs cluster in one corner. A construction site with cranes and excavation works occupies a portion of the frame, and condominium blocks are visible at the periphery.

Shophouse district viewed from above. Dense rows of shophouses with orange terracotta rooftops fill most of the frame in a tight grid of narrow streets. A large building with blue roof and several commercial buildings sit among the shophouses. HDB blocks are visible at the edges.

Commercial district viewed from above. Shopping malls and commercial buildings are clustered around an MRT station with tracks that run across the frame. One mall has a distinctive diamond-patterned rooftop, and an oval-shaped building sits at one corner. Some buildings have rooftop solar panels, and condominium blocks are visible at the periphery.

Construction site viewed from above. Exposed earth covers much of the frame. A school with orange-roofed buildings and a sports field sits along one edge. Residential buildings line one boundary, and dense greenery and a golf course border another.

Construction site viewed from above. Exposed earth and partially completed concrete structures occupy the centre. Residential buildings surround the site, and open green fields and mature trees border the construction area.

Land clearing site viewed from above. A large area of exposed orange earth occupies the centre of the frame, surrounded by dense forest. Access roads wind through the site and connect to buildings along one edge.

Construction site viewed from above. Exposed earth, structural foundations, and circular building footprints are surrounded by dense tropical forest. Buildings with dark and grey-blue roofs sit among the surrounding forest. A wide multi-lane road runs diagonally across an edge, and a reservoir is partially visible nearby.

Construction site viewed from above. A large angular plot of exposed orange earth is largely surrounded by dense tropical forest. An expressway and local roads border the site. Buildings with grey and brown roofs are visible across the road.

Train depot under construction viewed from above. A rectangular construction site is surrounded by dense tropical forest. A large building with parallel internal structures occupies one end, with fanning concrete foundations and partially completed structures across the remainder. An expressway curves along one side, with additional construction areas and buildings beyond it.

Construction site viewed from above. Structural foundations and partially completed structures with large footprints occupy the centre, with exposed earth throughout. An expressway runs along one edge and dense forest borders the periphery. Completed buildings with sports courts and a swimming pool are visible nearby.

Dense HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 20 slab and point blocks with dark rooftops fitted with solar panels are arranged in a grid pattern with mature trees between them. Covered walkways with orange roofs connect the blocks at ground level.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 15 slab blocks with grey roofs are arranged in rows, with several featuring rooftop solar panels. Multi-storey car parks and a sports court sit among the blocks. Orange-roofed covered walkways connect the blocks at ground level.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 15 slab blocks with grey rooftops are clustered around a central road junction with a roundabout. A hawker centre with multiple rectangular orange-red roofs is visible among the blocks. Mature trees line the internal roads between blocks, and sports courts sit along the edges of the frame.

Dense HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 15 slab blocks with orange-red pitched roofs are arranged around a central open field. Multi-storey car parks sit among the blocks, and sports courts and a swimming pool are visible at a corner of the frame.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 20 slab blocks with grey rooftops are arranged with mature trees between them, with several featuring rooftop solar panels. A sports court with a blue surface is visible among the blocks.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 12 slab blocks with grey and dark rooftops are arranged around internal roads, with some featuring rooftop solar panels. A building with an orange roof is visible adjacent to the estate. Multi-storey car parks and a sports court with a blue surface sit among the blocks, and dense trees border one edge of the frame.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 15 slab blocks with a mix of red and grey roofs are arranged in a compact cluster. Turquoise-coloured sheltered walkways connect the blocks, and an elevated LRT track curves along the edges of the estate. Multi-storey car parks and construction sites with exposed earth are visible within the estate.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 15 slab blocks with a mix of grey and orange rooftops are arranged in clusters. Sports courts and a multi-storey car park sit among the blocks, and dense tree canopy lines the main roads bordering the estate.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 15 slab blocks with grey rooftops and rooftop solar panels are arranged along internal roads lined with mature trees. An elevated MRT track curves through one corner of the frame.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 20 slab and point blocks are arranged in clusters across the estate. One cluster features blocks in a zigzag arrangement with solar panels on the rooftops. Dense tropical tree cover fills the spaces between buildings.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 15 slab and point blocks with grey rooftops are visible on both sides of an elevated MRT track that runs diagonally across the frame. A multi-storey car park sits among the blocks, and mature trees fill the spaces between buildings.

Dense HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 20 slab and point blocks with grey rooftops are arranged around a curving internal road, with several featuring rooftop solar panels. Orange-roofed covered walkways connect the blocks at ground level.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 13 slab and point blocks with grey rooftops are visible on both sides of an elevated MRT track that runs diagonally across the frame. Several blocks have curved footprints and rooftop solar panels. Sports courts sit among the blocks.
Dense HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 20 slab blocks with bent footprints and light blue and grey rooftops are arranged in a tight cluster. Solar panels are visible on several rooftops.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 15 slab and point blocks with grey rooftops are arranged among dense tropical trees, with several featuring arc-shaped footprints and rooftop solar panels. Multi-storey car parks are visible among the blocks, and sports courts along one edge.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 15 slab and point blocks with grey and orange-accented rooftops flank a canal running through the frame. Several blocks have rooftop solar panels. A major road runs along one edge, and a construction site occupies one corner.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 40 slab blocks fill the frame in a dense arrangement. A building with a distinctive orange cross-shaped roof sits at the centre. Landscaped areas and trees fill the spaces between the blocks. An LRT station is visible along one edge, with elevated tracks running along the periphery.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 15 slab blocks with grey rooftops are densely arranged around curving roads, with several featuring rooftop solar panels. Multi-storey car parks are visible within the estate, and dense tropical trees fill the spaces between blocks.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 20 point and slab blocks with grey rooftops are visible on both sides of a major road and an MRT track running diagonally across the frame. A blue triangular-roofed structure sits near the centre. Multi-storey car parks are scattered across the estate.

Dense HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 20 point and slab blocks are arranged on both sides of a major road interchange, with several featuring rooftop solar panels. Multi-storey car parks sit among the blocks, and a sports court is visible near the centre. Elevated LRT tracks run alongside the main road.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 20 slab blocks with grey rooftops and orange accents fill the frame, with most featuring rooftop solar panels. A blue flat-roofed building and an adjacent multi-storey car park sit at the centre. Orange-roofed covered walkways connect the blocks at ground level.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 20 slab blocks with blue rooftops are arranged in rows, many featuring rooftop solar panels. Buildings with orange roofs and a sports court occupy one edge.

Dense HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 20 slab and point blocks with grey rooftops are arranged in rows across the frame. Several point blocks feature oval rooftop structures. Sports courts with blue surfaces and multi-storey car parks are visible within the estate, and some blocks have rooftop solar panels.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 25 slab and point blocks are arranged alongside an MRT track that runs along one edge, with some featuring rooftop solar panels. Blocks with orange rooftops and curved and angular forms are visible at one corner. Sports courts and multi-storey car parks sit among the blocks, with construction activity occupying a few sites.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 20 slab and point blocks surround a large open green field that occupies one quadrant. A wide multi-lane road runs along one edge, and dense mature trees fill the spaces between blocks. Multi-storey car parks sit within the estate, and some blocks have rooftop solar panels.

HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 20 point and slab blocks are arranged in clusters around a central open space with a sports court and a blue sheltered walkway. Multiple blocks feature rooftop solar panels. Dense tropical trees fill the spaces between blocks, and multi-storey car parks and a major road are visible at the periphery.

Dense HDB estate viewed from above. Approximately 30 slab blocks fill the frame, arranged along a curving road that winds through the estate. A sports court and a light blue open area are visible near the centre. Dense tropical trees fill the spaces between blocks, and a multi-storey car park sits within the estate.

Industrial estate viewed from above. Rows of long narrow buildings with grey rooftops occupy a portion of the frame, with larger industrial buildings filling the remainder. An open green field spans one edge, and construction activity with exposed earth is visible nearby. Some buildings feature rooftop solar panels.

Industrial estate viewed from above. Warehouses and factory buildings with brown, grey, blue, and orange rooftops are arranged in a grid pattern. A major construction site with exposed earth occupies one edge, with smaller sites scattered across the estate. Tree-lined streets separate the lots, with patches of cleared land and green fields visible between the buildings.

Industrial estate viewed from above. Large warehouses and factory buildings with blue, orange, and grey rooftops are arranged in a grid pattern, with several featuring rooftop solar panels. An expressway runs along one edge. Tree-lined streets separate the lots.

Industrial estate viewed from above. Dense rows of warehouses and factory buildings with blue, orange, and grey rooftops fill the frame in a grid layout. An MRT track runs across the estate, and solar panels are visible on several rooftops.

Industrial island complex viewed from above. Dozens of large circular storage tanks with green, grey, and blue tops are clustered across a portion of the frame, surrounded by industrial buildings and structures. Canals run through the site, and cleared reclaimed land is visible along the periphery.

Industrial estate viewed from above. Dense rows of industrial buildings with grey rooftops fill the frame in a grid layout, with some featuring rooftop solar panels. Green fields and tree-lined streets are visible between the buildings.

Industrial estate viewed from above. Warehouses and industrial buildings with orange, grey and blue rooftops are arranged on a grid of tree-lined streets, with several featuring rooftop solar panels. A construction site with exposed earth occupies one corner, and a few green fields are visible across the estate.

Industrial estate viewed from above. Warehouses and factory buildings with grey, blue, and brown rooftops fill the frame in a grid of tree-lined streets, with some featuring rooftop solar panels. Two open green fields and sports courts sit among the buildings, and multi-storey car parks are visible at one corner.

Industrial island viewed from above. Two land masses connected by bridges across a narrow channel are densely packed with clusters of cylindrical storage tanks of varying sizes. Industrial structures and a network of roads occupy the spaces between the clusters. A jetty extends from the shoreline at one corner.

Waterfront industrial estate viewed from above. Warehouses and industrial buildings with orange, grey, and blue rooftops fill the frame, with several featuring rooftop solar panels. Circular storage tanks and chimney stacks are visible along the shoreline. Patches of green fields are scattered across the estate.

Dense industrial estate viewed from above. Warehouses and industrial buildings with grey, blue, and orange rooftops fill the frame in a tight grid, with some featuring rooftop solar panels. An MRT track runs diagonally across the estate, with two stations sitting along the track. A curved road and an adjacent green field are visible at one corner.

Industrial estate viewed from above. Dense rows of industrial buildings with grey rooftops fill the frame in a grid layout, with larger buildings interspersed among smaller blocks. Several buildings feature rooftop solar panels. Trees line the narrow streets between the buildings.

Industrial estate viewed from above. Warehouses and industrial buildings with grey, blue, and brown rooftops fill the frame, with some featuring rooftop solar panels. Open yards and patches of construction activity are scattered between the buildings. Cleared land and green fields are visible across the estate.

Mixed commercial and residential area viewed from above. A large shopping mall with rooftop solar panels occupies the centre of the frame, with a curved commercial building and multi-storey car parks nearby. Condominium blocks with gold-brown roofs and a swimming pool are visible at one corner, and HDB blocks fill another. Mature trees line the roads throughout.

Mixed commercial and residential area viewed from above. Multiple condominium towers with swimming pools are spread across the frame, with tennis courts visible among them. Rows of shophouses and landed houses with orange-red terracotta rooftops occupy one edge. Mature trees line the roads between the buildings.

Mixed-use area viewed from above. Low-rise buildings with red-brown and grey rooftops are scattered among dense tropical forest. Winding roads and car parks connect the buildings through the tree canopy. Sports courts with coloured surfaces are visible at one edge.

Mixed commercial and residential area viewed from above. HDB blocks with rooftop solar panels, condominium towers, and rows of shophouses are spread on both sides of an elevated MRT track that runs diagonally across the frame. A tree-lined corridor borders the track, and a place of worship with a distinctive circular white rooftop is visible at one corner.

Mixed commercial and residential area viewed from above. Rows of shophouses and landed houses with orange-red rooftops fill the frame, with a large circular-roofed building visible among them. Commercial buildings sit near the centre on either side of a main road. Condominium blocks with swimming pools occupy one edge, and dense mature trees line the streets throughout.

Mixed-use area viewed from above. An MRT station and multiple parallel tracks run diagonally through the centre of the frame, with construction activity visible on both sides. Two large shopping malls flank the tracks, one with arched blue roof panels and the other with a landscaped rooftop. A large shelter with alternating grey and white roof sections sits at one corner.

Mixed-use area viewed from above. A large angular building with a grey geometric roof sits among open green lawns and landscaped areas. Blue-roofed buildings are clustered at one corner, with a bus interchange nearby. Construction activity with cleared earth is visible in several areas, and a curved road loops through the centre of the estate.

Mixed commercial and residential area viewed from above. Dense rows of shophouses and landed houses with orange terracotta rooftops fill much of the frame in a tight grid of narrow streets. Condominium blocks with swimming pools and commercial buildings are visible along one edge. A major road runs diagonally through the frame.

Mixed-use area viewed from above. Several school compounds with orange-roofed buildings and sports fields occupy one side of the frame, with a prominent athletics track at the centre. Condominium blocks, HDB blocks, and landed houses with orange-red rooftops surround the schools. A canal runs through the estate, and a coastal park with dense trees and a beach strip border one edge.

Mixed commercial and residential area viewed from above. Tall commercial buildings and shopping malls are clustered around major road intersections. A construction site with exposed earth occupies one edge. Condominium towers and landed houses with orange-red roofs are visible at the periphery, along with a hawker centre.

Mixed-use area viewed from above. Multi-level flyover ramps curve through the centre where two expressways intersect. Two canals converge near the centre, running beneath the flyovers. School compounds with sports facilities occupy one quadrant, and a construction site with exposed earth is visible in another. Residential buildings cluster along the edges, with dense tree cover filling the spaces between.

Mixed-use area viewed from above. Condominium clusters with swimming pools and sports courts are spread across the frame, interspersed with HDB blocks and multi-storey car parks. A pair of large buildings with rooftop solar panels sits near the centre. Dense mature trees fill the spaces between the buildings.

Mixed-use area viewed from above. A circular bus interchange with a radial roof and rooftop solar panels occupies the centre, with parked buses visible. A shopping mall with a patterned roof, commercial buildings, sports courts, and a multi-storey car park sit nearby. Shophouses with orange shelters line one edge, and HDB blocks occupy another.

Mixed-use area viewed from above. A container terminal with dense rows of colourful shipping containers and cranes occupies one side of the frame. Dense mature tropical trees surround a dark pond in a park at the centre. Landed houses with orange rooftops and condominium complexes fill the opposite side, separated from the park by an expressway.

Reservoir park viewed from above. A large dark reservoir fills the frame, its irregular shoreline lined with dense tropical vegetation and a paved running trail. A floating structure with rectangular solar panel arrays sits on the water, and a construction clearing with exposed earth is visible in a corner. HDB blocks and condominium clusters with swimming pools line the reservoir boundary, including a cluster of buildings with blue rooftops.

River park viewed from above. A meandering river channel winds through broad open lawns and mature tropical trees. Small buildings and shelters sit among the vegetation, and pedestrian bridges cross the river at different points. A residential building and a main road are partially visible at the periphery.

Forested park viewed from above. Dense tropical canopy covers most of the frame, with a small lake and open lawns visible among the trees. Buildings with orange, white, and grey rooftops sit along winding pathways through the canopy. Landed houses with orange-red rooftops line the edges of the park, and a small construction site with exposed earth occupy one corner.

Coastal park viewed from above. A wide sandy beach stretches along one edge, backed by a strip of dense mature trees forming the park. An open air car park and adjacent building with a brown roof sit in the centre of the park. A breakwater extends into the sea from the shore, and an expressway flyover is visible at the periphery.

Gardens by the Bay viewed from above. The Supertree Grove with its cluster of circular tree-shaped structures occupies the centre. Two large dome-shaped buildings with ribbed glass rooftops are visible nearby. A long narrow lake runs along one side, and landscaped gardens with winding pathways fill the remainder. Marina Bay Sands is partially visible at one corner, and a road interchange and cleared land sit at another.

Lake gardens viewed from above. Two garden islands sit within a lake, with open lawns, winding pathways, and scattered buildings with orange and grey rooftops. Bridges connect the islands to the surrounding parkland. Dense vegetation with shelters and paved areas borders the lake along one edge, and a construction area with exposed earth is visible at one corner.

Forested park viewed from above. Dense forest canopy covers most of the frame, with roads cutting through the park partially visible beneath the trees. Condominium towers with a swimming pool sit at one corner, and buildings with a red and grey roofs occupy another.

Coastal park viewed from above. Dense tropical forest covers the park, with the sea along one side and open grassed land bordering the other. A T-shaped jetty extends into the water from the shore. Scattered buildings are visible at the fringes of the forest and along the coastline.

Reservoir park viewed from above. A large dark reservoir fills most of the frame, with dense trees and greenery lining the shoreline. A condominium complex with swimming pools and an elevated MRT track sits along the edges. A long pedestrian boardwalk with a circular viewing platform and a T-shaped jetty extend into the reservoir, and a golf course with green fairways is visible nearby.

Reservoir viewed from above. A large dark reservoir fills most of the frame, with dense tropical forest covering much of the shoreline. Buildings with orange rooftops and an expressway are partially visible at one edge, and a construction site with exposed earth occupies one corner.

Coastal park viewed from above. Dense tropical vegetation occupies the centre of the frame, with creeks running along either side. A sandy beach and the sea stretch along one edge. Open clearings and landscaped maze structures sit among the vegetation. Residential buildings and a waterpark are partially visible at the periphery.

Port terminal viewed from above. An L-shaped pier extends from a building into the harbour, with several vessels moored alongside. A large shopping mall with a curved roofline sits beside the building, and condominium blocks occupy another corner. An island is partially visible across the channel, featuring pools and low-rise buildings.

Cargo port viewed from above. A triangular wharf extends into the sea, with warehouses featuring rooftop solar panels lining both waterfront edges. A blue-roofed warehouse sits at the centre, with open storage yards and scattered cargo nearby. Cranes and cargo vessels are visible along the berths, and industrial buildings sit along the landward edge.

Container port viewed from above. A harbour channel separates a mainland container yard from an island terminal. A crane and cargo ship sit at the mainland berth. The island has colourful container stacks in dense rows, with cranes and cargo ships along the wharves. Trees and scattered buildings occupy the centre of the island.

Pier and marina viewed from above. A rectangular building with a white-ribbed roof sits at the waterfront, with several jetties extending into the harbour and vessels berthed alongside. A marina basin with dozens of small boats is enclosed nearby. Open green lawns line the landward side, separated from a coastal expressway.

Container port viewed from above. Berths line a U-shaped harbour basin, with cranes and container ships along the edges. Colourful container stacks fill the yards behind the berths in rows. An expressway runs along the landward edge, with residential and industrial buildings beyond.

Container port viewed from above. Dense rows of colourful shipping containers fill the terminal. Cranes line the waterfront berths, with cargo ships alongside. Circular storage tanks and jetties sit along the adjacent coastline, with commercial buildings with rooftop solar panels visible at the edge.

Shipyard viewed from above. A wharf extends into the sea, with a T-shaped jetty at the tip. Vessels with circular storage tanks and cargo ships are berthed along the wharf and jetty. Warehouse buildings with coloured rooftops are spread across the yard, with cleared land and smaller buildings along the landward edge.

Container port viewed from above. The triangular terminal has a cluster of colourful containers on one side and densely packed container rows spread across a larger area on the other. Cranes line the berths, with a few vessels alongside. An expressway curves along the landward boundary, with commercial buildings and a construction site beyond.

Shipyard and port viewed from above. Vessels and warehouse buildings with blue rooftops line one waterfront. Cranes and berthed vessels line the berths on the opposite side, with container stacks behind. Large areas of cleared land extend across the site.

Marina and port viewed from above. Yachts and boats are moored in rows in a marina basin. A Y-shaped shelter extends into the sea, with a large car park behind. Container storage yards with colourful stacks and cranes line the wharf. A coastal park with a pier and an expressway occupy the landward edge.

Train depot viewed from above. A large rectangular building with a rooftop solar panels occupies the centre, with fan-shaped rail sidings and multiple parallel tracks extending outward. An expressway runs along one edge and a narrow canal curves through another. Industrial buildings with rooftop solar panels, a sports field, a construction site and residential buildings are visible around the depot perimeter.

Train depot viewed from above. A large rectangular building sits at one edge, with fan-shaped rail sidings extending outward. A large angled building and smaller buildings with blue and grey rooftops sit nearby. Yellow buildings with their own rail sidings occupy an adjacent edge, and a canal and cylindrical storage tanks are visible in another.

MRT station viewed from above. The station with a grey rooftop sits alongside a road, with elevated tracks continuing across a canal that runs diagonally through one corner. Open grass fields and mature trees surround the station. A circular pavilion with a fan-shaped shelter sits nearby. Industrial buildings and a cylindrical storage tank are visible at one edge.

Train depot viewed from above. A large rectangular building with rooftop solar panels sits at one edge, with intersecting tracks spreading across the site. Blue-panelled buildings and larger dark-roofed buildings sit nearby, with smaller structures and open grassed areas beyond. An LRT station with an oval rooftop and elevated tracks is visible at one corner, with residential buildings and a multi-storey car park alongside.

Train depot viewed from above. A large rectangular building with a brown-grey rooftop occupies one half, with fan-shaped rail sidings extending outward. Open-air car parks and a multi-storey car park sit nearby. Industrial buildings are partially visible across a curving road, with an expressway running along an adjacent edge.

Transport complex viewed from above. Multiple buildings with rooftop solar panels occupy one half, with multi-lane roads fanning toward the water. A wide causeway extends across a body of water at one edge. Two buildings with distinct orange-red rooftops sit beside the complex, with residential areas visible along an edge.
